name: AuraCRM
title: AuraCRM — Open Source CRM for Frappe & ERPNext
description: Comprehensive CRM with Lead Scoring, Pipeline Management, AI Intelligence, Team Gamification, and Marketing Automation. Built natively on Frappe Framework with full Arabic/RTL support.
long_description:
AuraCRM is the most complete open-source CRM built for Frappe/ERPNext. It provides everything a sales team needs: visual pipeline boards, intelligent lead scoring, automated distribution, SLA tracking, AI-powered intelligence (OSINT, enrichment, content generation), team gamification with leaderboards, and multi-channel marketing automation including WhatsApp and social media.

Designed Arabic-first with full RTL support, AuraCRM serves businesses worldwide with seamless ERPNext integration — no more data silos between your CRM and ERP.

Free tier: 13 core features. Premium tier: 25 advanced features including AI and automation.
features: 9 specialized engines (Scoring, Distribution, Content, OSINT, Enrichment, Nurture, Reputation, Resale, Advertising)
AI-powered lead scoring and content generation
Team gamification with points, badges, and leaderboards
Open Core model — generous free tier

free_tier.includes: Lead Management, Pipeline Board, Basic Scoring, SLA Tracking, Basic Gamification

premium_tier.includes: AI Intelligence, OSINT, Enrichment, Advanced Automation, Deal Rooms, Advanced Gamification

enterprise_tier.includes: All Premium + White Labeling, Priority Support, Custom Integrations
